# job-market-data-analysis
End-to-end data analytics project analyzing trends, salaries, and skills in the Data Analyst job market.




OBJECTIVE

This project analyzes the current Data Analyst job market to identify the most in-demand skills, salary trends, and hiring patterns.

The goal is to help aspiring data analysts understand what companies are looking for in terms of tools, skills, and experience.

 DATASET

Source: LinkedIn Job Postings (2023–2024 Kaggle dataset)

Contains:

job titles
companies
locations
salaries
experience level
job descriptions

 TOOLS USED
Python (Pandas, NumPy)
Seaborn / Matplotlib
Tableau (Dashboard)
Jupyter Notebook


 ANALYSIS DONE
Data cleaning and preprocessing
Skill extraction (Python, SQL, Excel, Tableau, Power BI)
Salary analysis
Skill demand frequency


 KEY INSIGHTS
SQL is the most in-demand skill
Python increases salary potential
Excel remains essential but less high-paying
Salary data is partially missing (real-world limitation)



OUTPUT FILES
final_jobs_clean.csv
skills_summary.csv
